en.extract:
The lowland akalat (Sheppardia cyornithopsis) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.
Its disjunct range extends across the African tropical rainforest.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''lowland akalat''' ('''''Sheppardia cyornithopsis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].
Its disjunct range extends across the [[Guineo-Congolian Region|African tropical rainforest]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical dry forest]] and [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].
